creator: web@umich.edu
text:
It works for me: Thinkpad T16 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE with your patch, John.

I edited my /boot/device/hints file to change both uart (isa) entries to the new acpi version.  Then I rebooted, and the native keyboard works as it should.

Thanks for all that you do!  And thank Warner, too.

.
